error.message: The function massive tags in same commit is too long (77). The maximum length is 60.
The function version tags in current branch is too long (85). The maximum length is 60.
The function version tags sorted by timeline or semver 1 is too long (89). The maximum length is 60.
The function version tags sorted by timeline or semver 2 is too long (169). The maximum length is 60.
The function version tags sorted by semver is too long (85). The maximum length is 60.
The function last version tag in current branch is too long (71). The maximum length is 60.
Class GitTagTest is too large. Consider splitting it into smaller pieces.

The function calculatedVersion(warningLastVersionIsNotHigherVersion: (last: Version?, higher: Version?) -> Unit, tagPrefix: String, stage: String?, scope: String?, isCreatingTag: Boolean, mockDate: Date?, checkClean: Boolean) has too many parameters. The current threshold is set to 6.
The function random is too long (62). The maximum length is 60.

File '/home/runner/work/semver-gradle-plugin/semver-gradle-plugin/semver-gradle-plugin/main/kotlin/com/javiersc/semver/gradle/plugin/internal/GitRefGitExtensions.kt' with '14' functions detected. Defined threshold inside files is set to '11'

The function calculatedVersion(warningLastVersionIsNotHigherVersion: (last: Version?, higher: Version?) -> Unit, tagPrefix: String, stageProperty: String?, scopeProperty: String?, isCreatingSemverTag: Boolean, mockDate: Date?, checkClean: Boolean) has too many parameters. The current threshold is set to 6.
The caught exception is swallowed. The original exception could be lost.
Top level constant names should match the pattern: [A-Z][_A-Z0-9]*
This comment contains 'TODO:' that has been defined as forbidden in detekt.
The class PushSemverTag only contains utility functions. Consider defining it as an object.
